global_description: A small, slender bird with a rounded body and a distinctive white and black striped crown. It has a grayish-brown back, pale underparts, and a short conical beak. The wings and tail are brown with subtle streaks.

part_details.crown: White center stripe flanked by black stripes, creating a bold pattern.
part_details.beak: Short, conical, and pale in color.
part_details.wings: Brown with subtle streaks, blending with the back.
part_details.tail: Brown, matching the wings, with a slightly forked shape.

spatial_relations: The white crown stripe is centrally positioned between the black stripes.
The beak protrudes from the front of the head.
The wings extend laterally from the body.
The tail is positioned at the rear, extending from the body.
